name: Prune Whip
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Cooked dried prunes (drained and pitted)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mash the prunes.
2. Stir in the cooled cooked oatmeal and cinnamon; set aside.
3. Beat the egg whites until frothy.
4. Gradually add sugar, a tablespoon at a time, beating constantly until stiff and glossy.
5. Gently fold in the prune mixture.
6. Spoon into 6 individual dishes or a large serving dish.
7. Chill several hours or until set.
NOTE: Cook Quaker Oats (quick or old-fashioned), according to package directions.
